depression.description: I often feel like my efforts at work are pointless, and when my students don't respond positively, it just reinforces my belief that I'm a failure.
No matter how hard I try, I can't shake the feeling that I'm not good enough, both in my job and in my personal life.
I find myself constantly thinking about all the times I've failed at work, and it makes me feel hopeless about my future.
There are days when I seriously consider quitting my job because I feel so ineffective and unproductive.

Delusion.description: I can't shake the feeling that I'm completely powerless in my role, especially when my ideas are rejected by leadership.
When my friend mentioned my controlling behavior, I felt hurt and thought, 'Even he thinks I'm a failure.' It makes me question my worth.
I have a hard time dealing with authority figures because I feel like they dismiss my ideas and contributions, which makes me feel even more inadequate.
